Title: P0-01 Auth mode flags and routing guards
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: BE
Size: S
Depends on: none

Scope
- Add AUTH_PRINCIPAL_MODE=compat|did_strict runtime switch.
- Thread mode into auth boundary and deny reason mapping.

Definition of Done
- Strict mode can be enabled without route breakage in compat mode.
- Deny reasons are deterministic and logged.

Tests
- Unit tests for mode switching.
- Route contract tests for compat behavior.

Title: P0-02 Principal claim ingestion shim
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: BE
Size: M
Depends on: P0-01

Scope
- Parse optional claims: principal_did, principal_key_id, context_id, session_jti.
- Preserve legacy tuple extraction path.
- Pass both claim families into authz.py and ledger_scope.py.

Definition of Done
- Sensitive routes accept optional DID claims in compat mode.
- Existing tests green and new contract tests added.

Tests
- Route contract coverage for optional claims.

Title: P0-03 Stream/meta auth-context diagnostics
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: BE
Size: S
Depends on: P0-02

Scope
- Emit compact diagnostics: principal_source, context_id, authz_reason.
- Include in stream context_meta and/or final meta.

Definition of Done
- Diagnostics visible in one cloud turn and one local turn.
- No secrets leaked in payloads.

Tests
- Stream schema snapshot tests.

Title: P0-04 Middleware token pass-through envelope
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: MW
Size: M
Depends on: P0-02

Scope
- Accept bearer/opaque session token from frontend.
- Forward normalized auth claims to backend headers/payload.
- Maintain legacy fallback path under compat mode.

Definition of Done
- Backend sees consistent auth claim envelope from middleware.
- Existing non-auth smoke tests still pass.

Tests
- Middleware integration tests for claim forwarding.

Title: P0-05 Frontend debug visibility for auth/context
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: FE
Size: S
Depends on: P0-03

Scope

- Display stream upstream markers: x-ds-upstream-url and fallback flag.

Definition of Done
- Operator can diagnose auth/context decisions from browser only.

Tests
- Frontend smoke: diagnostics panel populated.

Title: P0-06 Observability baseline
Body:
Priority: P0
Owner: OPS
Size: M
Depends on: P0-03

Scope

- Alerts for deny spikes and token validation failures.

Definition of Done

Tests
- Alert fire-drill in non-prod.

Title: P1-01 Principal registry schema and API
Body:
Priority: P1
Owner: MW
Size: L
Depends on: P0-04

Scope

- Add read endpoints for principal status and key references.

Definition of Done
- Principal lifecycle (create/disable/read) is operational.

Tests
- Registry CRUD + authz tests.

Title: P1-02 Passkey/WebAuthn challenge and verify endpoints
Body:
Priority: P1
Owner: MW
Size: L
Depends on: P1-01

Scope
- Implement /auth/challenge and /auth/verify.
- Verify origin, rpIdHash, challenge, signature, sign-count.
- Bind credential_id to principal_did.

Definition of Done
- One passkey login path works end-to-end in staging.

Tests
- WebAuthn verification tests + replay/sign-count checks.

Title: P1-03 Session token issuer and validator
Body:
Priority: P1
Owner: MW,BE
Size: L
Depends on: P1-02,P0-02

Scope
- Middleware issues short-lived signed token with scoped claims.
- Backend validates token and maps claims into existing authz boundary.

Definition of Done
- Token-authenticated writes succeed with DID provenance fields.
- Expired/invalid tokens fail with deterministic reason.

Tests
- Token mint/verify tests and route integration coverage.

Body:
Priority: P1
Owner: BE
Size: M

- Add parity checks for dual-write integrity.

Definition of Done
- Sampled turns show both field families populated correctly.

Tests

Body:

Priority: P1

Body:
Priority: P2
Owner: BE
Size: M

Size: M

Title: P2-03 Remove legacy write authority semantics
Body:
Priority: P2
Owner: BE,MW
Size: M
Depends on: P2-01

Scope
- Legacy tuple remains metadata only.
- Authz decisions use DID/capabilities exclusively.

Definition of Done
- No sensitive route authorization depends on legacy tuple.

Tests
- Static and integration checks for legacy auth references.

Body:
